req.title: Card PIN change (negative variant)
req.statement: A customer shall change their card PIN at most 5 times per 24-hour window. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.

doc.reasoning: The requirement mandates a 5-per-24h PIN change rate limit on /cards/{id}/pin. Tests are derived using: EP for a valid single PIN change (happy path); NEG for an unauthorised caller (403); BVA for the exact 5th attempt (boundary-inclusive success) and the 6th attempt (boundary-exclusive, 429); STC to model the transition from under-limit -> at-limit -> over-limit; and DT for the combination of valid auth + exceeded limit producing 429. Each test resets state via <reset_pin_attempts_fixture> so it is idempotent.

tests.name: test_pin_change_single_valid_request_returns_200
preconditions: Customer is authenticated with a valid bearer token
Card belongs to the authenticated customer
No prior PIN change attempts in the current 24-hour window
actions: Send PUT /cards/{id}/pin with valid new_pin payload
trace: EP: representative member of valid-request equivalence class
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_single_valid_request_returns_200(
    auth_headers,          # <fixture>: returns {"Authorization": "Bearer <token>"}
    owned_card_id,         # <fixture>: returns card id owned by caller
    reset_pin_attempts,    # <fixture>: resets rate-limit counter before test
    api_base_url,          # <fixture>: returns base URL string
):
    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{owned_card_id}/pin"
    payload = {"new_pin": "1234", "confirm_pin": "1234"}

    response = requests.put(url, json=payload, headers=auth_headers)

    assert response.status_code == 200
    body = response.json()
    assert body.get("pin_updated") is True

tests.name: test_pin_change_unauthenticated_request_returns_401
preconditions: No valid bearer token is present in the request
actions: Send PUT /cards/{id}/pin with no Authorization header
expected: Response body contains an error indicating missing or invalid credentials
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_unauthenticated_request_returns_401(
    owned_card_id,      # <fixture>: returns a valid card id
    api_base_url,       # <fixture>: returns base URL string
):
    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{owned_card_id}/pin"
    payload = {"new_pin": "1234", "confirm_pin": "1234"}

    response = requests.put(url, json=payload)  # no auth header

    assert response.status_code == 401
    body = response.json()
    assert "error" in body or "message" in body

tests.name: test_pin_change_fifth_attempt_succeeds
preconditions: Customer is authenticated with a valid bearer token
Card belongs to the authenticated customer
Exactly 4 PIN change attempts have been made in the current 24-hour window
expected: 5th PIN change in the window is accepted
trace: R-FIN-072 - at most 5 times per 24-hour window
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_fifth_attempt_succeeds(
    auth_headers,              # <fixture>
    owned_card_id,             # <fixture>
    reset_pin_attempts,        # <fixture>: resets counter first
    seed_pin_attempts,         # <fixture factory>: callable(card_id, count)
    api_base_url,              # <fixture>
):
    seed_pin_attempts(owned_card_id, 4)  # place counter at 4

    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{owned_card_id}/pin"
    payload = {"new_pin": "5678", "confirm_pin": "5678"}

    response = requests.put(url, json=payload, headers=auth_headers)

    assert response.status_code == 200
    assert response.json().get("pin_updated") is True

tests.name: test_pin_change_sixth_attempt_returns_429
preconditions: Customer is authenticated with a valid bearer token
Card belongs to the authenticated customer
Exactly 5 PIN change attempts have already been made in the current 24-hour window
expected: Response contains Retry-After header or rate-limit error body
trace: R-FIN-072 - Error pathway: 429 when rate limit exceeded
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_sixth_attempt_returns_429(
    auth_headers,
    owned_card_id,
    reset_pin_attempts,
    seed_pin_attempts,
    api_base_url,
):
    seed_pin_attempts(owned_card_id, 5)  # counter already at limit

    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{owned_card_id}/pin"
    payload = {"new_pin": "9999", "confirm_pin": "9999"}

    response = requests.put(url, json=payload, headers=auth_headers)

    assert response.status_code == 429
    # Retry-After or error body must be present
    has_retry = "Retry-After" in response.headers
    has_body_error = "error" in response.json() or "message" in response.json()
    assert has_retry or has_body_error

tests.name: test_pin_change_state_transition_zero_to_over_limit
preconditions: Customer is authenticated with a valid bearer token
Card belongs to the authenticated customer
PIN change counter is at 0 for the current 24-hour window
expected: State transitions: IDLE -> ATTEMPT_1 -> ... -> ATTEMPT_5 -> BLOCKED
trace: R-FIN-072 - at most 5 times per 24-hour window
STC: full state path from zero attempts through blocked state
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_state_transition_zero_to_over_limit(
    auth_headers,
    owned_card_id,
    reset_pin_attempts,
    api_base_url,
):
    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{owned_card_id}/pin"

    for attempt in range(1, 6):
        pin = str(1000 + attempt).zfill(4)
        resp = requests.put(url, json={"new_pin": pin, "confirm_pin": pin},
                            headers=auth_headers)
        assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Attempt {attempt} expected 200"

    # 6th attempt must be blocked
    resp6 = requests.put(url, json={"new_pin": "0000", "confirm_pin": "0000"},
                         headers=auth_headers)
    assert resp6.status_code == 429

tests.name: test_pin_change_foreign_card_returns_403
preconditions: Card ID belongs to Customer B, not Customer A
Rate limit counter is irrelevant (auth check fires first)
actions: Send PUT /cards/{foreign_id}/pin with Customer A credentials
expected: Response body contains ownership or permission error
trace: R-FIN-072 - Precondition: card belongs to caller
DT: decision combination of valid-auth + card-not-owned => 403
tests.executable:
import pytest
import requests

def test_pin_change_foreign_card_returns_403(
    auth_headers,         # <fixture>: Customer A token
    foreign_card_id,      # <fixture>: card id owned by Customer B
    api_base_url,
):
    url = f"{api_base_url}/cards/{foreign_card_id}/pin"
    payload = {"new_pin": "4321", "confirm_pin": "4321"}

    response = requests.put(url, json=payload, headers=auth_headers)

    assert response.status_code == 403
    body = response.json()
    assert "error" in body or "message" in body
